case_title: BUSH VIRGEAN VS ALLEN SPENCER SR.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEN SPENCER SR.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN SPENCER SR.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22097, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSH VIRGEAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLEN SPENCER SR. JUDG.ENTERED ON 12/2/2 IN SUP.CT.SCA 22097. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BUSH VIRGEAN AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN SPENCER SR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSH VIRGEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN SPENCER SR. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,013.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEN SPENCER SR. HEARING SET FOR AUG-10-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-10-1992, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSH VIRGEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN SPENCER SR. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,012.79, MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. FOR EQUITABLE INTEREST IN THE VAN PLFT AWARDED $4000. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
